entries.name: BitNet-GPT2 Binary (Baseline)
entries.description: Binary/ternary projection of GPT-2 architecture using 1-bit weights with sign activations. Theoretical radical-efficiency baseline demonstrating the upper bound of quantization-driven TFE reduction.

entries.name: DistilGPT-2 INT4 (Baseline)
entries.description: DistilGPT-2 (6-layer, 81.9M params) projected to INT4 quantization. Demonstrates combined architecture-level and quantization-level TFE reduction.

entries.name: GPT-2 INT4 (Baseline)
entries.description: GPT-2 124M architecture projected to INT4 quantization. Aggressive quantization baseline.

entries.name: DistilGPT-2 FP16 (Baseline)
entries.description: DistilGPT-2 (6-layer, 81.9M params) at FP16 precision. Demonstrates architecture-level efficiency via distillation without aggressive quantization.

entries.name: GPT-2 INT8 (Baseline)
entries.description: GPT-2 124M architecture projected to INT8 quantization. Moderate efficiency baseline.

entries.name: GPT-2 FP32 (Baseline)
entries.description: Unmodified GPT-2 124M from HuggingFace. FP32 weights. Worst-case baseline — every submission should beat this.
